title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Samsung India Electronics Capital India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Samsung India Electronics Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics Capital India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics Capital India:
Samsung India Electronics Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics Capital India!
